prerequisites: A Google account or a Google Cloud (GCP) service account to authenticate with the Google Sheets API.
A Google Cloud project with the Google Sheets API enabled.
An existing Google Spreadsheet and its link (used for the spreadsheet_id config field).
Write access to the target spreadsheet for the authenticating account, since this connector writes data to the sheet.

authMethods.name: OAuth 2.0
authMethods.summary: Uses the credentials.client_id, credentials.client_secret, and credentials.refresh_token secret fields. Create an OAuth client ID in Google Cloud, then obtain a refresh token authorized for the https://www.googleapis.com/auth/spreadsheets scope (for example via the Google OAuth Playground).

authMethods.name: GCP Service Account
authMethods.summary: Uses the credentials.service_account_info secret field. Provide the full JSON key of a Google Cloud service account that has access to the target spreadsheet.

setupSteps.title: Enable the Google Sheets API
setupSteps.body: In the Google Cloud console, select or create a project and enable the Google Sheets API for it.

setupSteps.title: Authenticate with OAuth (option A)
setupSteps.body: Create an OAuth client ID in Google Cloud and generate a client secret. Obtain a refresh token authorized for the https://www.googleapis.com/auth/spreadsheets scope, for example by using the Google OAuth Playground. Supply these as credentials.client_id, credentials.client_secret, and credentials.refresh_token.

setupSteps.title: Authenticate with a service account (option B)
setupSteps.body: Open the Service accounts page in the Google Cloud console, select your project and service account, go to the Keys tab, and create a new key of type JSON. Download the key file and provide its full JSON contents as credentials.service_account_info. Ensure the service account has access to the target spreadsheet.

setupSteps.title: Configure the spreadsheet
setupSteps.body: Set spreadsheet_id to the link of the Google Spreadsheet you want to write to. Provide your chosen authentication method under the credentials field to complete the connector configuration.
